thread.title: President-Elect Donald Trump Endorses Randy Fine to Succeed Rep. Matt Waltz in Florida’s 6th Congressional District
thread.title_full: President-Elect Donald Trump Endorses Randy Fine to Succeed Rep. Matt Waltz in Florida’s 6th Congressional District

author: Space Coast Daily
title: President-Elect Donald Trump Endorses Randy Fine to Succeed Rep. Matt Waltz in Florida’s 6th Congressional District
text: President-Elect Donald Trump Endorses Randy Fine to Succeed Rep. Matt Waltz in Florida’s 6th Congressional District By Space Coast Daily // November 23, 2024 PRESIDENT TRUMP: Randy has been an incredible Voice for MAGA, and the Great People of Florida Fine was elected to the Florida Senate on Nov. 5 in District 19 after spending eight years in the Florida House President-elect Donald Trump issued the following endorsement on Truth Social of Florida State Senator Randy Fine for the 6th Congressional District seat recently vacated by Trump’s nomination of Matt Waltz as his national security advisor. I am hearing that America First Patriot Randy Fine is considering launching his Campaign for Congress in Florida’s 6th Congressional District! A Harvard Educated, Successful Businessman, and Highly Respected State Legislator, Randy has been an incredible Voice for MAGA, and the Great People of Florida. In Congress, Randy will be an INCREDIBLE Fighter who will work tirelessly with me to Stop Inflation, Grow our Economy, Secure the Border, Champion our Military/Vets, Restore American Energy DOMINANCE, Protect our always under siege Second Amendment, and Restore PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH. Should he decide to enter this Race, Randy Fine has my Complete and Total Endorsement. RUN, RANDY, RUN! In reply to President Trump’s endorsement, Fine said on X, “Clearly Mom wasted no time once she made it upstairs. “Mr. President, G-d saved you on that day in Butler so that you could save the world. It would be the honor of my life to be one of your footsoldiers. Your confidence is overwhelming and I will have news to share soon!” The 6th Congressional District includes Flagler and Putnam counties and parts of Volusia, St. Johns, Marion, and Lake counties. Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis will announce a special election to fill the 6th Congressional District vacancy. Candidates are not required to be residents of the congressional district they seek as long as they reside in the state. Fine was elected to the Florida Senate on Nov. 5 in District 19 after spending eight years in the Florida House. Clearly Mom wasted no time once she made it upstairs. Mr. President, G-d saved you on that day in Butler so that you could save the world. It would be the honor of my life to be one of your footsoldiers. Your confidence is overwhelming and I will have news to share soon! [pic.twitter.com/Zt9Tj3rF6e]— Senator Randy Fine (@VoteRandyFine) [November 23, 2024]
